title: Judgment of dismissal; effect
doc_html:
Art. 1844.  Judgment of dismissal; effect

A judgment of dismissal with or without prejudice shall be rendered and the effects thereof shall be regulated in accordance with the provisions of Articles 1671 through 1673.
doc_text:
Art. 1844.  Judgment of dismissal; effect
A judgment of dismissal with or without prejudice shall be rendered and the effects thereof shall be regulated in accordance with the provisions of Articles 1671 through 1673.
